\tzpentry{ID3599}{Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3599 introduces Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}[\Psi, \pi, t] = \pi_\omega \cdot \vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}} + \pi_r \cdot \dot{\vec{r}}_{\text{cm}} - \mathcal{L}_{\text{total}} \end{equation}
